summary: Fixed and verified Save & Print functionality on Billing Workspace. Issue was missing 'tax_rate' field in API request causing 422 validation error. After fix, all features work: bill saves, print dialog appears with bill details, Close and Print Receipt buttons functional.

backend: POST /api/bills - Returns 200/201 with bill_number after fix
Bill data persisted correctly in database
frontend: Navigate to /billing/new - Billing Workspace loads correctly
Click search result adds medicine to bill
Click SAVE & PRINT button saves bill via API
Print dialog modal appears with 'Bill Saved Successfully!' title
Print Receipt button (data-testid='print-receipt-btn') visible and triggers window.print()
Clicking Close button closes dialog and clears bill

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: BillingWorkspace.js saveBill() was missing 'tax_rate' field required by BillCreate Pydantic model
Changed customer_phone to customer_mobile to match API model
Removed unused fields (subtotal, total_discount, total_gst, grand_total) that backend calculates
Print receipt uses CSS @media print for thermal receipt format (80mm width)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing product SKU 3004 (Paracetamol 500mg).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Save & Print on /billing/new is now working. Key selectors: data-testid='save-print-btn' for Save & Print, data-testid='close-print-dialog' for Close, data-testid='print-receipt-btn' for Print Receipt. Print dialog shows bill_number, customer, items count, payment method, and total. The thermal receipt (80mm) is rendered via CSS @media print.

bug_fix_details.root_cause: BillingWorkspace.js saveBill() function was missing required 'tax_rate' field in billData object sent to POST /api/bills. Backend BillCreate Pydantic model requires 'tax_rate: float' as a mandatory field.
bug_fix_details.fix_applied: Added 'tax_rate: billItems.length > 0 ? billItems[0].gst_percent : 5' to billData. Also changed 'customer_phone' to 'customer_mobile' to match API model, and replaced 'total_discount' with 'discount' to match API field name.
bug_fix_details.verification: All Playwright tests passed - bill saves successfully, print dialog appears with correct data, buttons work as expected.
